text: Representation learning aims to automatically discover the features needed for detection or classification from raw data. Bengio, Courville & Vincent (2013) established it as a core goal of deep learning.
Word2Vec (Mikolov et al. 2013, Google) demonstrated that continuous word embeddings capture semantic relationships (e.g., king - man + woman ≈ queen), revolutionizing NLP representation learning.
CLIP (Radford et al. 2021, OpenAI) learns joint image-text representations by contrastive pretraining on 400M web image-text pairs, enabling zero-shot transfer to downstream vision tasks.
